basis: Local seed identifies a legendary RU creature with precombat instant/sorcery payoff text.
Scryfall card context and EDHREC Commander context exist.
WotC/Playgroup set context supports the Secrets of Strixhaven Commander release.

source_limit_notes: Do not merge this card with older Rootha copy-spell profiles.
No copied public decklist or runtime dependency.

themes.name: precombat_big_spell_tokens
themes.notes: The commander creates a flying haste Elemental at combat based on the greatest mana value spell cast that turn.

themes.name: cost_reduction_and_treasure_setup
themes.notes: Big precombat instants/sorceries need mana support.

themes.name: elemental_token_finishers
themes.notes: The deck converts single large tokens into combat damage, copied tokens, or damage triggers.

themes.name: tempo_interaction
themes.notes: Reactive spells are useful but should not crowd out precombat trigger reliability.

avoid_patterns.reason: Rootha, Mastering the Moment is a combat token payoff commander.

examples: mostly counters and removal with few precombat spells
avoid_patterns.reason: The combat trigger needs spells cast before combat on your turn.

examples: no high-MV spells, producing only small Elementals
avoid_patterns.reason: The token size scales with greatest mana value.
